 My video card's driver=EF=BB=BF needs KMS to works so I can't answer in th=
 e moment. I'll try it on a little bit older hardware this afternoon.
 
 I've tested it with new Xorg (v1.10.6 - 2012-02-10 from ports) and xf86-vi=
 deo-intel-2.17.0 with KMS support on Intel HD Graphics 2000 (Core-i3 2120 =
 SandyBridge).
